title: 2306 A Wooden Orrery #AlgoLaserMK2, #AlgoOS, #AlgoLaserSmartMachine
description:
You can find the files for this at https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6801698 to form the planets and https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6801717to make the mechanism
